name: Maple Syrup Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the maple syrup, shortening, and eggs together.
2. Mix the dry ingredients (flour, raisins, spices, nutmeg, cloves, salt, baking soda, and baking powder) with the buttermilk until well combined.
3. Add the mixed dry ingredients to the creamed mixture and beat until everything is thoroughly blended.
4. Grease an 8x8 pan and pour the batter into it.
5. Bake in a preheated oven for 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the cake to cool before frosting as desired.
